models_used.openai_image_prompt_suffix: Emphasize crisp commercial lighting and a catalog-ready composition.
models_used.gemini_image_prompt_suffix: Render as one coherent photographic scene; single clear focal subject.

retrieval_queries: What do customers say about appearance, packaging, color, size, shape, texture, sheen, matte or glossy finish, and whether photos match the product?
What defects, damage, misleading pictures, wear after washing, pilling, fading, or quality issues are mentioned?
What materials, fabric, foam, plastic, liquid, fill, weave, stitching, or construction details are described?
What do reviews say about smell, scent, fragrance, chemical odor, natural ingredients, or formula?
What about cleaning results, residue, slipperiness, whitening, efficacy, comfort, or how well it works?
What tactile qualities do customers mention: softness, firmness, plushness, warmth, coolness, weight, rigidity, or hand-feel?
What mood, atmosphere, lifestyle, or setting do reviews imply: cozy, clinical, bright gym, laundry room, nursery, minimalist studio?
